description_long: This is a slice of layered cake with a creamy yellow interior and a thin, slightly darker layer in the middle, likely representing a custard or mousse. The top of the cake is adorned with several large, realistic strawberries, some halved to reveal their juicy red interiors, and a single small blueberry nestled among them. The cake sits on a textured, translucent plate that mimics the look of glass or plastic. The sides of the cake are smooth and even, with a subtle gradient of color from light yellow to a deeper golden brown near the base. The strawberries on top are glossy and vibrant, providing a striking contrast to the soft, matte finish of the cake layers. The overall presentation is appetizing and visually appealing, suitable for display in a bakery or café setting.
description: A slice of layered cake with creamy yellow layers, topped with glossy strawberries and a blueberry, presented on a translucent plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed tip of the cake slice and a cluster of strawberries arranged symmetrically on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the distinct cake layers and the cross-section of halved strawberries, with the plate edge visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the central strawberry and the even, smooth back of the cake slice.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the cake's layered structure and the arrangement of fruit, including a visible blueberry.
